description: Style Note femella does chic casual in their trademark uber cool style with these tops. Printed and creatively designed, these tops are wardrobe essentials that we can't do without! Paired with a short pencil skirt and heeled sandals, you'll be dressed to impress. Product Details Black and beige casual translucent shirt with an animal print, sleeveless, full buttoned placket, mandarin collar with a split V neckline, an irregular hemline in the front, a small loop at the back yoke and petal design at the back hemline Material and Care Blended fabric Wash cold with like colours Do not wring or bleach Dry inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
